name: 咸鱼的挂机游戏
short_description: You need to build a team and get rewards through automatic battles. Of course, if you are free, you can also manual control the players to overcome more difficult battle in the game and get more rewards. Keep collecting equipment with better properties or nurturing stronger pets.
detailed_description:
This is an on-hook game, where you need to build a team and get rewards through automatic battles.
Of course, if you are free, you can also manual control the players to overcome more difficult battle in the game and get more rewards.
Keep collecting equipment with better properties or nurturing stronger pets.
about_the_game:
This is an on-hook game, where you need to build a team and get rewards through automatic battles.
Of course, if you are free, you can also manual control the players to overcome more difficult battle in the game and get more rewards.
Keep collecting equipment with better properties or nurturing stronger pets.
supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
